nav.signedOutMessage: You can no longer assign loot until you log back in.

welcome.subtitle: Assign loot fairly, keep a clear record of who got what, and settle priority without the raid-chat arguments.

statistics.title: See the whole picture
statistics.body: Loot distribution, priority tracking, and per-player history for every brother.

assign.title: Assign loot in seconds
assign.body: Search any item from Blizzard's catalog and hand it to the right raider.

welcome.accessNote: Browsing is open to the whole Brotherhood. Assigning loot needs the guild access code.

login.title: Brotherhood access
login.subtitle: Enter the Brotherhood's access code to unlock loot assignment.
login.failedMessage: That access code didn't work. Try again.

lootAssigner.title: Loot Assigner
lootAssigner.subtitle: Look up an item and record who looted it.

empty.searchTitle: Search for an item to assign
empty.searchHint: Type an item's name above to look it up on Blizzard's database, then assign it to one or more players.
empty.errorHint: We couldn't reach Blizzard's item database to look up "{{query}}". This is a connection hiccup, not a spelling problem — try again.
empty.noItemsHint: Nothing matched "{{query}}". Check the spelling or try a broader term.
empty.noMatchesHint: None of the {{count}} results for "{{query}}" contain "{{filter}}".

characters.title: Characters
characters.subtitle: Link each raider's characters — main and alts — to their guild name, so loot priority follows the person, not the character.
characters.loginHint: Log in with the guild code to link characters.
characters.emptyMessage: Add players from the Loot Assigner first, then link their characters here.

linkChar.title: Link a character
linkChar.description: Tie a WoW character to {{player}}. Loot priority is counted across all of their characters.
linkChar.notFound: That character couldn't be found. Check the name and realm.

addPlayer.title: Add player
addPlayer.description: Add a character to the guild roster so they can receive loot.

assignItem.title: Assign item
assignItem.confirmWarning: This can't be undone from the app. Double-check before recording.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.subtitle: Loot distribution and pickup priority across the guild.
statistics.errorMessage: We couldn't reach the loot vault. Check your connection and try again.
statistics.emptyMessage: Add players from the Loot Assigner to start tracking who looted what.

lootList.empty: Nothing looted yet — the vault awaits.
